name: import_synplify
short_description: Imports the given Synplify project file
full_help:
import_synplify

Description: 
Imports the given Synplify project file

Syntax: 
import_synplify  [-copy_sources] [-quiet] [-verbose] <file>

Returns: 
list of files object that were imported from the Synplify file

Usage: 
  Name             Description
  ----------------------------
  [-copy_sources]  Copy all the sources from synplify project file into the 
                   created project
  [-quiet]         Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]       Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>           Name of the Synplify project file to be imported

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Copy all the sources from synplify project file into the created project
Suspend message limits during command execution
